name: Easy Range-Top Chocolate Confections
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy saucepan, mix and bring to a boil the sugar, cocoa, milk, and butter, stirring occasionally.
2. Boil for 1 1/2 minutes.
3. Remove from heat and add vanilla, peanut butter, and oats; mix well.
4. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper or spread in a greased 9 x 9 x 1-inch pan.
5. Cool for a few hours or until firm.
6. Cut the confection into 1-inch squares. Makes about 80.
